title: stelis cylindrica
intro: Stelis cylindrica, also known as the cylindrical Stelis or Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis cylindrica are said to include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Stelis cylindrica can be made by drying the plant's roots and leaves, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea or decoction.
